pages.text: It is said that the Starless Night is haunted by echoes of pain that linger within the pitch-black blade. This formidable claymore can be obtained by upgrading an Obsidian Claymore using collected rare treasures and curiosities.

Beyond possessing all the functionalities of the Obsidian Claymore, this blade can unleash blade-like air currents infused with Void energy, and inflicts the Void Touched effect upon beings. When its attack damage exceeds a target's remaining health, the excess damage is transferred to surrounding creatures.

For certain arcane reasons, this claymore can be inserted into a staff for spellcasting, functioning akin to a focus. When loaded into a Void Staff, it fires Void slashes reminiscent of Razor Wind Focus. When not used with a Void Staff, it serves the function of an End Walk focus.
It can absorb Soul Energy for self-repair.
